item.title: Vance Rejects Midterm Poll; GOP ‘Still Digging Out of the Hole the Democrats Put Us In’
item.description: Vice President JD Vance took issue with a Fox News poll showing a majority of voters preferring Democrats to Republicans in the upcoming November 2026...

item.title: AOC Exposes the Left’s Attack on Western Culture
item.description: This weekend, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez revealed her contempt for the rich heritage of Western culture, and why the Right is correct to oppose her...
